tasks.title: TradingAgents KR Investment Briefing
tasks.prompt: Use $tradingagents-daily-investment-work in kr mode from the local C:\Projects\TradingAgents project. Prepare the canonical event, compose and validate the complete Korean KR intraday investment briefing, then acknowledge the exact event and emit its receipt/state. Never use Chrome or the ChatGPT web composer.
